mdSummary:
# Drawer

Slide-up sheet for mobile-first contextual content.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Overlay
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/drawer

## Parameters

| Drawer | IsOpen | `bool` | `` |  |
| Drawer | IsOpenChanged | `EventCallback<bool>` | `` |  |
| DrawerClose | Context | `Drawer.DrawerContext` | `default!` |  |
| DrawerClose | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| DrawerClose | Class | `string?` | `` |  |

| DrawerContent | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (Drawer) — RenderFragment slot

## Events

## Sub-components

## Keyboard

## Example

